title: Currencies
description: Currencies endpoint can be used to fetch details about currencies the Toshl API supports. The response includes an `ETag` which you _should_ use to see if any of the currencies have changed since your last check. For daily exchange rates please use a service like the awesome [Open Exchange Rates](https://openexchangerates.org) which we already use in our apps.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Number of decimal places for currency.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the currency was last modified.

currencies.description: A comma separated list of currencies to return.

since.description: Return all currencies that were modified since timestamp.

types.description: Return all currencies of a specific type.
